tracks.meaning: to jump or leap lightly over something, typically by running and jumping
to omit or leave out a part of something, especially to proceed without reading or considering intervening material
to leave hastily or depart without paying or fulfilling an obligation
to move a read/write head across storage media to a different location
a recorded track or section of audio on an album or recording
the captain of a ship or boat
in tennis or similar sports, to miss hitting a ball or to avoid playing a shot
to pass on taking a turn or making a bet in a game
to fail to appear in court or to abscond from legal obligations
to be absent from school or a class without permission
a container used for storing things, typically a cylindrical or rounded vessel
